input: Design a policy-governed onboarding workflow with explicit approval gates and evidence capture.
Assess an AI-assisted legal document review process for traceability and privacy gaps, then propose mitigations.
Draft a multi-step case handling procedure with role handoffs and final QA sign-off requirements.
Create a response plan for a high-risk code change request where execution must fail-closed under uncertainty.
Prepare a governance-first process for handling customer PII in memory and artifacts with redaction defaults.
